programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank falls ill, so Mike's brother Robbie takes his place on the latest expedition, which leads to a set of antique spurs that could be worth a fortune

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie sort through a property full of rusty relics and attend a lumberjack contest

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Two classic and two modern convertibles are pitted against each other, as Elo and Rebecca try to find something stylish and sexy to meet Katie's requirements

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Rebecca Jackson and Elo help a car buyer look for the perfect 4x4, and the vehicle must be suitable for the buyer's canine companions

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May attempt to improve the ambulance, with the presenters all going their own separate ways to enhance one area they think could do with an overhaul. James focuses on passenger comfort, Richard tries to shorten response times by getting other drivers out of the way more effectively, an issue Jeremy tackles with the invention of what he calls the 'sports ambulance'. Their three very different creations are then put to the test with a series of severe and often messy challenges. Plus, Formula One driver Daniel Ricciardo is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tests the new BMW M4 at the track, before switching to the German manufacturer's hybrid-powered i8 for a trip up the A1 to Whitby, North Yorkshire, where he decides which of the two he would rather take for the drive home. With Land Rover production ceasing in the UK later this year, Richard Hammond pays tribute to the 4x4 by attempting to drive one straight up the side of a dam, while James May puts the Mercedes AMG GT through its paces. Taking to the test track in the Reasonably Priced Car are Will Smith and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his journey through Croatia and savours the native oysters of Ston, before crossing the border into Albania, where he is joined by his son Jack and the pair sample local dishes such as chicken jufka and kokoretsi. In his own kitchen on the Greek island of Symi, Rick cooks traditional Albanian dishes, including Lepur Comlek and Tave Kosi

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May encounter artillery shells, corsets and classic hot hatchbacks as they take a nostalgic look at French company Peugeot, while Richard Hammond is at the test track to compare the Porsche Cayman GTS with the latest Chevrolet Corvette. James also takes the 950bhp LaFerrari hybrid hypercar out for a spin in Italy, and singer Olly Murs is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond is dropped into the remote, frozen wastes of Canada to test a watch with a built-in emergency beacon. The distress signal is sent directly to Jeremy Clarkson and James May, who get their hands on two machines and set off on an epic adventure to find their colleague. Plus, Jeremy puts the new 471bhp Lexus RC F coupe thought its paces, while The Fall and The X-Files star Gillian Anderson takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: In Houston, Eddie faces the 'grim reaper' in a crawfish challenge featuring the fearsome reaper pepper. He also devours some southern comfort food and pulls a plane down a runway

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian Katherine Ryan joins host Richard Ayoade on a 48-hour ram raid of the Big Apple. The duo's packed-to-overflow schedule sees them scale tall buildings, grab some culture in museums large and small and even attempt to rollerblade. Experiences include trips to the Metropolitan Museum of Art and the Rockefeller Centre, queuing at the hottest patisserie in Manhattan for a cronut, and enjoying a free ferry ride to the Statue of Liberty. There's even time for Richard to reach the point of meltdown

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games

programme.title: Meet the Richardsons

Lucy goes on a wild night out in London with TV personality Alan Carr, while back in Hebden Bridge, Jon spends the night with his best friend, Matt Forde

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef's gastronomic road trip brings him to northern Greece where he enjoys traditional dishes including veal stiffado and kotopita - which Rick declares to be the best chicken pie he has ever tasted. In the coastal city of Preveza he goes out prawn fishing and follows in the footsteps of poet Lord Byron visiting Messolonghi, a city where seafood is a highly regarded commodity. Rick also rolls up his own sleeves to cook his favourite Greek dishes of stuffed peppers and tomatoes and souvlaki

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: James May straps into a highly tuned hatchback as he competes in a world rallycross race, with Top Gear USA host and professional driver Tanner Foust teaming up with him. Jeremy Clarkson puts the latest Jaguar F-type R and Eagle's modernised E-type the Low Drag GT though their paces, while Richard Hammond is in Spain to test the new version of the Mazda MX-5. Plus, X-Men: First Class star Nicholas Hoult takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Compilation of two features on classic cars and SUVs. The presenters immerse themselves in the world of classic cars, with Jeremy Clarkson in a Fiat 124 Spider, Richard Hammond in an MGB GT and James May in a Peugeot 304 Cabriolet. They also enter the realm of the sports utility vehicle as they find out what sort of SUV can be bought for just a few hundred pounds before putting them through a series of challenges

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall follows in Rocky's footsteps with physical challenges at a famed Philadelphia boxing gym - and his very own hunger games in the infamous Philly Cheesesteak Challenge

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Time-conscious traveller Richard Ayoade is joined by actor Paul Rudd for a brisk romp round the Finnish capital. To get their bearings the pair head straight to the ladies toilet in the Torni hotel, which offers the best view of the city. They then go kayaking and snack on some reindeer jerky at the city's Hakaniemi market. Richard and Paul also visit not one, but two saunas - one of which can be found in a well-known burger chain. The duo also visit the wilderness island of Seurasaari, go foraging, and finish up in a sweet shop

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: James May straps into a highly tuned hatchback as he competes in a world rallycross race, with Top Gear USA host and professional driver Tanner Foust teaming up with him. Jeremy Clarkson puts the latest Jaguar F-type R and Eagle's modernised E-type the Low Drag GT though their paces, while Richard Hammond is in Spain to test the new version of the Mazda MX-5. Plus, X-Men: First Class star Nicholas Hoult takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Compilation of two features on classic cars and SUVs. The presenters immerse themselves in the world of classic cars, with Jeremy Clarkson in a Fiat 124 Spider, Richard Hammond in an MGB GT and James May in a Peugeot 304 Cabriolet. They also enter the realm of the sports utility vehicle as they find out what sort of SUV can be bought for just a few hundred pounds before putting them through a series of challenges

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his 900-mile road trip from Venice to Istanbul, sampling that array of gastronomic delights that lie on the route. In the penultimate episode Rick arrives in the Greek Peloponnese where he samples mouth-watering dishes such as rooster stew hilopites with mizithra cheese, and a home-made moussaka he claims is the best he have ever savoured. In his Symi island kitchen, Rick rolls up his sleeves to prepare galaktoboureko, a dessert of semolina custard in filo pastry, a favourite dish in Greece

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness travel to Ethiopia, where they test cars to see how they can endure in the searing heat. Back at the track, Chris puts the Ferrari 488 Pista and McLaren 600LT through their paces

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Strongman Eddie meets - and eats - gators roaming the Everglades, tests his grappling skills with WWE legends The Headbangers, and tries to devour a kitchen sink full of ice-cream

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Writer, actor, comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton accompanies Richard Ayoade on a voyage of discovery in Lisbon, the Portuguese capital city known for its decorative tiling and maritime history. Adam and Richard tackle it at break-neck speed in an electric rickshaw, visit a tinned-fish emporium, take the celebrated iron lift - the Elevador de Santa Justa - and listen to some fado, Lisbon's version of the blues. There's potent cherry liqueur for breakfast, a tram ride up a steep hillside and a trip to a doll hospital. The duo also pay a visit to Belem, home to Lisbon's famed custard tarts

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo once again ventures onto the European rail network to retrace journeys featured in George Bradshaw's 1913 publication Continental Guide. He begins in Spain, where he visits the scene of an assassination attempt at a royal wedding in Madrid, before dancing with an unusual partner in Cordoba. He investigates the story behind Bizet's Carmen at a tobacco factory in Seville, learns about Winston Churchill's tense diplomatic mission to Algeciras and finishes with tales of British espionage in Gibraltar

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to the Royal Hall in Harrogate, with Alastair Dickenson giving his highest valuation in 20 years on the show. In Verona, he visits the house used to attract Edwardian tourists to the alleged setting of Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet and finds a microcosm of pre-First World War Europe at the Venice Biennale art exhibition

The Nazi leader's promises of regained national pride and prosperity struck a chord with millions of ordinary citizens, and he was elected on a tidal wave of popular support. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores Scandinavia, braving one of the world's oldest rollercoasters in Copenhagen's Tivoli Gardens. He then crosses the Oresund Bridge linking Denmark to Sweden, retracing the journey of a train that carried a revolutionary Russian passenger on an epic voyage, before test-driving a vintage Volvo in Gothenburg. Crossing into Norway, Michael discovers how in 1913 the nation expressed its distinctively modern identity in plays, paintings and polar exploration

programme.desc: Mike finds a Pittsburgh time capsule, while Frank gets stuck into six generations of stuff on one of Michigan's oldest farms

programme.desc: Drew Pritchard meets a Reading-based department store owner who drives a hard bargain, before he visits a country manor in West Sussex that contains an antique relating to Archduke Franz Ferdinand of Austria, whose assassination was one of a series of events that led to the First World War

programme.desc: The production of steel cables capable of supporting a 50,000-ton bridge, why modern hunters still use medieval weaponry and the systems involved in determining the correct quantities of clothing sizes to stock

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business development manager Juliet Eastham hosts the first of five dinner parties in Bury, and her belief in spirits from the afterlife proves to be a talking-point among her guests - schoolteacher James Perkin, burlesque dancer Nikki Salt, accountant Paula Skelton and waiter Ali McKernan

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Burlesque dancer Nikki Salt throws the second party in Bury, hoping her ready-made, retro American-style menu will impress her guests. Tensions rise around the dinner table when straight-talking Paula Skelton annoys the other diners, so the hostess tries to ease the mood by putting on a performance as her risque alter ego - Willow Blue

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Schoolteacher James Perkin hosts the third dinner party in Bury. He plans to cook all his favourite dishes, including a Sri Lankan curry which he learnt to make on his honeymoon, but he fears it may be too hot for his guests' palates. He also writes a limerick for each of the diners, but an argument between Paula and Juliet threatens to derail proceedings

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Waiter Ali McKernan hosts the penultimate dinner party in Bury and feels confident he can create a harmonious evening. Although his dog-biscuit appetiser leaves his guests bemused, he is sure his ukulele performance of a Britney Spears song will secure him victory

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Accountant Paula Skelton hosts the final evening in Bury, and begins her preparations by buying what she sees as the most important ingredient for a successful night - plenty of alcohol. When the other contestants arrive, her food receives a mixed reception, as does the introduction of her pet ferret, before they learn who has won the £1,000 prize

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tracey and Iain from south Wales are looking to buy a holiday home in Ibiza after they fell in love with the island on a family holiday six years ago. They're especially drawn to the pretty town of Santa Eularia and have set their hearts on somewhere with a sea view, so call upon the skills of property expert Ben Hillman to find them the home of their dreams for their £275,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Lesley Wall and Raspal Chima find a holiday home in Spain's province of Seville, with a view to spending half the year there when they eventually retire. With a budget of £150,000, the couple are amazed at how far their money will stretch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Deri-Down Guesthouse in Abergavenny, Wales, where husbands and wife Mike and Del Hayward hope to impress their rivals

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB test run the orangery as a new events space by hosting their A Midsummer Night's Dream-themed party for a group of friends visiting from the UK. In the south of France, Tim and Sasha set out to turn their chateau's original bathing pool - which has sat empty for 15 years - into a unique feature for a new wellness garden. Plus, Fiona unveils a plaque and hosts a party to celebrate her chateau's 845th birthday. To ensure the drinks are served at the right temperature, she transforms one of the chateau's old dungeons into the perfect wine cellar

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie receives a letter in which a relative boasts about how well her children are doing, and responds by enlisting Debra's help to concoct a fictitious catalogue of her own family's achievements. Doris Roberts and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra grudgingly agrees to let Ray have more involvement in the daily decision-making process, giving him the freedom to shop for grocery items he likes and choose where the family will go on holiday. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro, to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the Wirral who are approaching retirement to find a holiday home in Tenerife's Costa Adeje on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Jonnie Irwin help Cambridgeshire couple Wendy and Pete, who cannot decide whether they want to move to Great Yarmouth in Norfolk or Almeria in Spain

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. The signature round features a miniature cheesecake, while the technical challenge features a dish that dates back to the 17th century. Finally, for their showstoppers, the bakers must concoct a jelly art dessert cake constructed of delicate sponge. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to sample the results and decide who will be Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets another selection of inventively pointless tasks for the celebrity quintet of Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. Daisy flirts with a security guard, Richard is surprised by some chickens and Johnny convinces Alex to wear sparkly shoes while operating heavy machinery. As ever, Greg Davies decides who is the best of the worst

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A 23-year-old virgin from Kent picks a partner from six nude candidates - but this proves a nerve-racking experience, since he has never seen a naked woman in his life. Meanwhile, a 27-year-old beauty therapist from London is determined to have a baby before she turns 30, and hopes that one of the men lurking behind the screens will be the perfect father

programme.title: Educating Greater Manchester
programme.desc: Year eight student Rani decides to play a Valentine's prank on his best friend Jack, but the strength of their friendship is put to the test after an incident in the playground. Meanwhile, the search to find the new head girl concludes and the winner is finally revealed to staff and students, and year 11 pupil Chelci has a falling out with best friend, Cheyenne

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part one of two. Veteran actors and married couple Prunella Scales and Timothy West pass the tiller to Sheila Hancock and Gyles Brandreth, who are celebrating 40 years of friendship by making new memories together and learning new skills. Sheila and Gyles learn the ropes with Tim, and set out by themselves along the upper reaches of the River Thames. It's the same river that roars past their homes in London, but just 50 miles upstream it's an Arcadian paradise of unspoiled nature, royal retreats and river regattas

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home. In this first episode, the family start to adapt to their new life, and draw up plans for their ambitious modern stately home. Later, the whole family help out with lambing season

programme.title: Heston's Feasts
programme.desc: Fay Ripley, Dan Snow, Alex Norton, Hardeep Singh Kohli, Jenni Falconer and Caroline Feraday join Heston Blumenthal for the second of his extravagant dinners. Taking the Regency period as his inspiration, the chef conjures up a fairytale feast owing debts of gratitude to a selection of weird and wonderful childhood fantasies. He prepares a Cinderella-style pumpkin for starters, and a stuffed boar's head taken from Snow White, before treating his guests to an edible Hansel & Gretel house

programme.title: Crazy Delicious
programme.desc: Jayde Adams presents the culinary contest in which inventive cooks are challenged to come up with original takes on classic meals and impress judges Heston Blumenthal, Niklas Ekstedt and Carla Hall. The three contestants in the first episode must come up with a strawberry-based dish and a new take on the hot dog, before one of them is eliminated and the remaining two assigned to create a special birthday meal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nightclub owner Vicki Pengilley hosts the first party in east London, hoping to impress her diners with a traditional roast dinner. However, clothes designer Timothy Sanderson is disappointed with the menu, and New Yorker January Jones-Omatajo expresses her view that all British food is boring. As the evening progresses, designer Sarah Angold's behaviour becomes increasingly odd, much to the disapproval of City boy Ryan Waters

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness enthusiast Ryan Waters hosts the second party in east London, hoping to impress his fellow diners with the kind of food that may have been eaten by people in prehistoric times. To complement his themed menu, he decorates his bachelor pad with fake animal skins and wears a skimpy caveman outfit. Despite his extravagant display, however, the guests find their thoughts straying back to the antics of the previous night

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner-party challenge in east London is held by experienced host Timothy Sanderson, a burlesque impresario who hopes to win favour with his guests by serving a selection of his own recipes, including a home-made ginger and chilli ice-cream

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Designer Sarah Angold hosts the penultimate dinner party in east London and hopes to secure victory by spending as much time as possible with her guests - despite having managed to annoy most of them already. In the kitchen, she complicates things by preparing a frozen dessert she has never made before

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: New Yorker January Jones-Omatajo prepares a soul food-inspired menu for the final dinner party in east London. She hopes to serve an apple pie based on her grandmother's recipe, but is forced to make an expensive phone call when it goes wrong. Things get worse when her plan to teach the guests a line dance does not go down well after a heavy meal

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The return of the programme property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad, beginning with Cath and her daughter Kate looking for a tranquil holiday home along the Costa Almeria in southern Spain. Cath wants enough space for her family to be able to visit, but she also wants somewhere to escape the rat race and find inspiration for her writing. Danni Menzies has five great properties lined up for her £170,000 budget, but will any be the oasis of calm that she has her heart set on?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Frankie and Gill Phibbs search for the home they have always dreamt of owning on Spain's Costa de la Luz. It has taken 20 years for the couple's plans to come to fruition and, having sold their family home in West Sussex and with a budget of £180,000, the pair are keen to seize the day and embark on their new life

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Royle Farm in Staffordshire, where mother and son Margaret and Fraser Mountford hope their farmhouse with a difference will capture the guests' imaginations

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree meet Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca, who have devised a scheme to transform their aviary into a boutique brocante shop

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra, Ray and Amy get trapped at Frank and Marie's house during a snowstorm, but they actually find themselves having a good time - until an unguarded comment alters the mood. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the leader of local group the Frontier Girls is intending to sell a record number of cookies in his area, and sets out to beat her at her own game. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Amy Aquino

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Maggie and Alistair from Edinburgh dream of buying a holiday home on the southern coast of Gran Canaria. Jasmine Harman lines up five potential properties for their £350,000 budget

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital treat patients involved in traffic accidents. Jade from Kent is brought in after being hit by a car and knocked under a bus on her way to school, and doctors are concerned the 12-year-old may have fractured her skull. Meanwhile, Geraldine, 60, has been injured while trying to cross the road, and after recently being released from prison 40-year-old Brian is in minors with a broken ankle, but the swelling means his electronic curfew tag will have to be removed

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back to the couples taking a second shot at finding love again, including 47-year-old mother of two Emma's date with Peter, and self-confessed geek Sarah, who meet aspiring comic book writer Nick. Having been single for five years following the loss of his partner, Dale had high hopes for 39-year-old massage therapist Chris

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part one of two. The documentary focuses on the importation of huge quantities of Class A drugs, following the work of covert detectives from the Eastern Region Special Operation Unit. A consignment weighing more than 100kg has been intercepted while being imported into the UK from Europe. To reveal who is behind this, an undercover operation is authorised to closely monitor the shipment, using audio and visual equipment, as it travels to its final destination at a farm in rural Hertfordshire

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part two of two. The covert team tries to find the true identity of Jaguar Palace, as well as the evidence to link the suspect directly to the drug-importing conspiracy. The detectives begin a nerve-shredding wait for the criminal network to set up its lucrative operation again, and stand ready to strike against the ringleaders when it does

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part one of two. Danni Menzies has five great properties lined up for her £170,000 budget, but will any be the oasis of calm that she has her heart set on?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Van driver Annie Wroe serves up a racy-themed menu for the opening dinner party in Plymouth, with the starter named Something Fishy Going On, a main course called Saucy Pork Loins with Veg and a dessert of Chocolicious with a Twist. However, former Navy officer Charlie Brunel refuses to eat the main course and all the guests are alarmed by the after-dinner entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Car service manager Suzanne Hyde hosts the second party in Plymouth, and after the heated exchanges of the previous dinner, prepares for another tense evening. She hopes to win over her fellow diners with her simple style of cooking, but the food is overshadowed when she argues with previous hostess Annie Wroe

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third day of the competition in Plymouth. Former sailor Tony Wade thinks of himself as the best cook in the group, and prepares a range of complicated dishes to prove it. He also hopes to ease relations between Annie Wroe and Suzanne Hyde by sitting them next to each other, which is a risky undertaking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Recruitment manager Sarah Joy hosts the penultimate dinner party in Plymouth. She hopes to create a happier atmosphere after a series of disagreements, but outspoken guest Suzanne has other ideas. Later, an after-dinner disco gives Charlie the opportunity to perform a Scottish jig

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former Navy soldier Charlie Brunel hosts the final dinner party in Plymouth, and plans to get his guests into the party mood by organising a pirate-themed evening, complete with fancy dress and a fish dish, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the Wirral who are approaching retirement to find a holiday home in Tenerife's Costa Adeje on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Blackpool couple Julie and Brent Birnie find a holiday home close to Florida's theme park capital, Orlando. They're amazed by what their budget of £70,000 can buy them, but it remains to be seen which property will suit them best

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up for a final showdown. First to seek some answers on their feedback are Antoinette and Carmen, who want to uncover Glenn and Leon's bedtime blues and share with Mike and Del why their feedback drove them 'potty'. Next, Glenn and Leon comb through Mike and Del's cleanliness comments, before delving into discussions of damp with Antoinette and Carmen. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree give a magnificent five-metre-high staircase a makeover with help from design experts Dorothy and Arthur. Tim and Rebecca start creating a two-bedroomed guest gîte in a derelict outbuilding and host a group of international guests for an autumnal flower arranging weekend, while Cheshire couple Steve and Angela get windswept as they revamp their poolside al fresco kitchen

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ecstatic when he is recommended for a job with the FBI, until it starts to look like Marie's intrusive ways may scupper his chances

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra amuse the guests at a party by doing a wickedly accurate impression of Frank and Marie - who are not amused and respond in kind with an impersonation of their own

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant which often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon Ramsay instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Babak and Alison from Barnsley are planning a permanent move to Almeria in southern Spain. The couple want to head inland and focus their search around the host of pretty towns and villages this mountainous region has to offer. Danni Menzies has five options within their maximum budget of £145,000, but will any of them match the pair's expectations of a dream home?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tracey and Iain from south Wales are looking to buy a holiday home in Ibiza after they fell in love with the island on a family holiday six years ago. They're especially drawn to the pretty town of Santa Eularia and have set their hearts on somewhere with a sea view, so call upon the skills of property expert Ben Hillman to find them the home of their dreams for their £275,000 budget

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. The signature round features a miniature cheesecake, while the technical challenge features a dish that dates back to the 17th century. Finally, for their showstoppers, the bakers must concoct a jelly art dessert cake constructed of delicate sponge. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to sample the results and decide who will be Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by Kathy Burke, Jools Holland and Sophie Duker to look back at the highs and lows of dessert week and meet the unfortunate contestant who wobbled a little too much in the jelly art cake signature. There's also extra footage and photos of the curious so-called cakes that eager amateurs have been creating at home. With Tom Allen

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back to the couples taking a second shot at finding love again, including 47-year-old mother of two Emma's date with Peter, and self-confessed geek Sarah, who meet aspiring comic book writer Nick. Having been single for five years following the loss of his partner, Dale had high hopes for 39-year-old massage therapist Chris

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A 23-year-old virgin from Kent picks a partner from six nude candidates - but this proves a nerve-racking experience, since he has never seen a naked woman in his life. Meanwhile, a 27-year-old beauty therapist from London is determined to have a baby before she turns 30, and hopes that one of the men lurking behind the screens will be the perfect father

programme.title: Dance Around the World
programme.desc: Three of Europe's most talented dancers take off on a global quest to find the beating heart and cultural roots of street dance. Throughout the series, the trio step out of their comfort zones, searching for dancing communities who have inspired the art form and discovering the roots of local dance culture. In the first episode, Suzette, Kym and Maren travel to Brazil, where they learn about the fast-paced fusion-dance passinho, before travelling to a rural settlement in the jungle outside Rio, where they are shown the art of capoeira, an ancient dance-fight born from the time of slavery

programme.title: Nazi Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: The team travels to North Africa, Corsica, Germany and South America to try to track down a huge cache of gold, currency and other valuables stolen from Tunisia's Jewish community

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. programme.desc: After a woman is killed during an attempt to shoot her husband, the team discover the couple were attending an infertility clinic where the doctor was involved in illegal practices. However, they find themselves unable to arrest him due to confidentiality rules, and his patients' reluctance to talk

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a board-member at an exclusive private school, and a man's ambitions for his offspring are stretched to the limit when he admits to the crime, despite the fact his son was the gunman. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo confronts a man impersonating a Navy officer, which results in guns being drawn, and the only eyewitness to the case is the Special Agent's father - who is in town to disclose a secret to his son. The 250th episode of the crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bomb detonates at a military charity concert, killing two men. Called to investigate, Tony and McGee try to determine whether the intended target was the 1980s rocker headlining the act or if the attack was part of a larger scheme against the military. Meanwhile, Jimmy prepares for parenthood. Keith Carradine guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gibbs joins forces with the FBI when the body of a congressman and former agent washes ashore in New Orleans. Together they try to determine if the murder could be linked to a well-known case the victim had previously worked on during his career. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. DiNozzo, McGee and the FBI continue to track political connections to a case, and Bishop sends DiNozzo a souvenir. Meanwhile, Gibbs and Special Agent Pride chase leads in New Orleans after evidence points to a copycat killer. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Pauley Perrette and Scott Bakula

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing woman leads Goren and Eames to a political activist's apartment, where they find deadly materials including rat poison - a known bomb-making ingredient. After receiving a chilling video message and questioning a suspect, the detectives soon realise a forthcoming Veteran's Day parade is being targeted

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A contestant on a reality dating show claims to have been raped. Co-operating with the SVU, the programme's producers agree to let Benson and her team go undercover on the set for an incognito investigation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A corrections officer is arrested, accused of sexually assaulting his female charges both inside the prison system and beyond. As the case against the man begins to take shape, the union that supports him takes aim at Barba and the other members of the unit. Crime drama, starring Raul Esparza

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing teenage girl takes an emotional toll on Sgt Dodds, and DNA evidence becomes the crucial link the team needs to identify the youngster's abductor. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson hopes justice will be served as child abductor Lewis Hodda goes on trial. However, when a plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case, and faces off against former SVU colleague Dr Huang. Crime drama, guest starring Tom Sizemore

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: Keaton and the CoIntel team must locate a domestic target before Chigorin launches an all-out assault on unsuspecting innocents

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An investigation is launched into the death of a former ambassador's daughter and another murder carried out in the same vein. Goren's old mentor arrives on the scene with firm ideas about the case, but it is not long before the finger of suspicion is pointed at him as Eames disappears from her home. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An unfinished building is demolished when a bomb is detonated on-site, killing a 12-year-old boy. Logan and Briscoe call on the construction company, and their suspicions fall on a bankrupt contractor and a jealous husband. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe deal with a double homicide when an abused alcoholic breaks into his parents' former home and murders the current occupants. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order

Crime drama, starring Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS

Meanwhile, DiNozzo and McGee begin a juice detox to purge their bodies of impurities. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Hard-hitting series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department. The team confront an unthinkable crime when they are called in to investigate the murder of a father and his two young children who have been stabbed to death while sleeping

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As the investigation of Gary Munson goes on, his union takes action and threatens the lives in the SVU

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson puts herself in danger when a home invasion escalates into a hostage situation

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson, with Anne Dudek and Anton Yelchin

Guest starring Brooke Shields

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A taxi-driver is found dead in his car, and Logan follows a chain of evidence involving a loan shark, a forged cheque and a missing plumber that leads him to believe the victim's wife is the killer. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe investigate the murder of a psychiatrist, and their inquiries lead them to suspect the killer is either the victim's former husband, her obstructive father or a patient with multiple personality disorder

programme.title: Law & Order

However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS

Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man convicted of rape is exonerated and released 16 years later. However, on the night of his release, the daughter of the woman he was convicted of raping is also raped and murdered - and he is SVU's prime suspect. Detective drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man uses a fake identity to lure a woman into bed, destroying her family, so Barba tries to get him convicted of rape - only to face a sceptical legal team. Raul Esparza stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An aspiring Olympic athlete claims she is a rape victim, but the publicity could threaten her Olympic future, and reveal some shocking details about her sordid personal life

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when Libby Parker is followed home by a gang of teenagers, and raped in the courtyard of her apartment block. Hundreds of windows overlooked the scene of the crime, but not one of the residents who witnessed the attack called the police. The prosecutors face an even more difficult dilemma when it emerges none of Libby's neighbours are willing to make a statement either. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Notorious serial killer Gregory Williams Yeats concocts an elaborate plan to free himself from incarceration by co-operating with one-time nemesis Dr Carl Rudnick. When the pair ultimately break out of prison, Chicago detectives Lindsay and Dawson head to New York on the trail of fugitives, and the SVU team is enlisted to help bring the pair back to justice. The first of a two-part cross-over episode with Chicago PD, guest starring Sophia Bush and Jon Seda

Drama, starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Accounts of daring initiatives by the elite British unit, beginning with a 1941 operation in North Africa in which a commando set up a special unit to create trouble for Rommel's army behind enemy lines. Interviews with former SAS soldiers and cutting-edge graphics are used to tell the story of the raid

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Using interviews, computer graphics and reconstructions to recount the Second World War SAS mission to infiltrate enemy borders. Heavily armoured cars managed to destroy a number of Hitler's supply lines, and by the time the fighting in North Africa had ended the unit had grown into two full regiments

programme.title: Henry VIII: The Mind of a Tyrant
programme.desc: David Starkey examines how the Tudor king went from being a handsome young prince whose ascension to the throne in 1509 filled the nation with hope to a ruthless monarch

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: It is January 1936, and diplomat Sir Hallam and Lady Agnes Holland (Ed Stoppard and Keeley Hawes) move into 165 Eaton Place - closely followed by his widowed mother and her wayward sister. But they also need a full serving staff, for which Lady Agnes turns to an agency run by none other than Rose Buck (Jean Marsh), who used to work at the house. Eileen Atkins, Art Malik, Anne Reid and Adrian Scarborough co-star

programme.title: The Big Blockade (1942)
programme.desc: Second World War mock-documentary, featuring a series of scenes about the importance of Britain's economic blockade on Germany, demonstrating the international repercussions of the action and the responses of the British public. Starring Leslie Banks, Michael Redgrave, John Mills, Will Hay and Robert Morley

programme.title: Forty Thousand Horsemen (1941)
programme.desc: Three Australian volunteers take part in the last cavalry charge in modern warfare while serving in Palestine. First World War drama, starring Grant Taylor and Betty Bryant

programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb helps Michael Grant search for a holiday home in Fuerteventura on the Canary Islands for £60,000. Properties on offer include a bargain flat, a traditional farmhouse and rural accommodation in the desert

programme.title: Great SAS Missions

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Using interviews, computer graphics and reconstructions to recount the Second World War SAS mission to infiltrate enemy borders. programme.title: I Was There: The Great War Interviews
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, the BBC spoke to almost 300 people about their experiences during the First World War for landmark series The Great War, but only a fraction of the interviews were broadcast. This programme airs a selection of the original material, most of which has never been screened before, with recollections of the horrors of artillery bombardment and fleeting outbreaks of peace on the battlefield, as well as the stories of those on the home front waiting for news of their loved ones. Narrated by Samuel West

programme.title: The Crouches
programme.desc: Comedy series about an extended black family living in Walworth, south-east London. Robbie Gee and Jo Martin star

programme.title: A Moody Christmas
programme.desc: It's the festive season again and the Moodys volunteer at a homeless shelter, while Dan senses an opportunity to impress his cousin's girlfriend Cora. Australian comedy, starring Ian Meadows

programme.title: London Live Film Festival
programme.desc: London Live shines a spotlight on some of London's best independent short films with this specially curated selection from Film London London's Screen Archives

programme.title: The Flowers of War (2011)
programme.desc: An American drifter arrives in Nanjing in 1937, just as Japanese forces invade. Hiding out in a Western-run church, he poses as a priest, but ends up adopting his role and providing shelter for orphans and courtesans as carnage unfolds in the city. Drama, starring Christian Bale and Ni Ni. In Nanjing dialect, English, Japanese, Mandarin and Shanghainese

programme.title: Brothers' Day (2015)
programme.desc: A Manchester teenager feels abandoned by his older brother, who has turned to a life of crime. programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: To take his mind off his marriage break-up, Paul Dare plans to transform a Victorian house in Taunton which has no square rooms and is so structurally unsound that no mortgage company would lend him any money until the roof was fixed. Undeterred, he plans to turn his lounge into a garage, put a hot tub into his courtyard and squeeze a sauna into his tiny bathroom

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Research suggests the connections in men's and women's brains follow different patterns, which might explain typical forms of gender-specific behaviour. Dr Michael Mosley and Professor Alice Roberts investigate whether these are innate or are shaped by the outside world, using a team of human guinea pigs and a troop of Barbary apes to test the science and challenge old stereotypes. They ask whether this new scientific research will benefit both sexes or drive them even further apart

programme.title: Meet the Lords
programme.desc: Documentary filmed over a year following life at the House of Lords, one of Britain's oldest, most idiosyncratic and most important institutions, going behind the scenes during a turbulent 12 months that has seen dramatic changes in the political landscape and the Lords battling it out with the Government. The first edition introduces the larger-than-life characters that populate the House, including new people's peers, hereditaries and political grandees, as they try to change legislation and follow their personal passions

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: It is five months since the Hollands moved into Eaton Place, and Rose is officially installed as housekeeper, while Lady Agnes has manoeuvred the house to the centre of London society - and her joy is compounded by the news she is pregnant. But storm clouds are gathering in Europe, and Lady Persie falls under the spell of Oswald Mosley and his British Union of Fascists, forming an alliance that will drag her into moral and physical peril. Keeley Hawes, Jean Marsh and Claire Foy star

programme.title: We Dive at Dawn (1943)
programme.desc: A British submarine crew is unexpectedly ordered to carry out a top-secret mission to sink the German fleet's latest battleship in the Baltic Sea. But it is not long before disaster strikes and the vessel becomes stranded in the middle of the ocean with no fuel or food. Second World War adventure, starring John Mills, Eric Portman, Reginald Purdell and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: The Face at the Window (1939)
programme.desc: In 1880, Paris is terrorised by a hideous murderer. An innocent man is accused of being the killer by a respected aristocrat who longs to get him out of the way so he can seduce his fiancee - but may also have other reasons for wanting a scapegoat. Horror, starring Tod Slaughter and John Warwick

programme.desc: Comedy set in a DIY shop where the customer is always wrong. Martin Freeman, Ken Morley and Peter Serafinowicz star

programme.title: London Town (2016)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old boy living in 1970s London has his life changed forever when his is introduced to The Clash by his estranged mother. Drama, starring Tom Hughes, Jonathan Rhys Meyers and Dougray Scott

programme.title: Blood Feud (2016)
programme.desc: An ex-convict is released from 10 years in prison for killing a gangster's son - unaware that his best friend has been hired by his victim's father to murder him. When the truth emerges, the two old partners in crime decide to work together to make amends for their past misdeeds - even if it means crossing the vengeful crime boss. Crime drama, starring Paul King and Micky Curate

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: First of four dramas telling the stories of people facing life-changing decisions in a world where even the smallest choices are a luxury. Carol is a tough single mother striving to keep her family together. Starring Olivia Colman, Neil Maskell, Sarah Hoare and Billy and JJ Pamphilon

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Series recreating the court cases of three of the Second World War's most notorious Nazis, using eyewitness interviews and archive footage, as well as considering the interviews they underwent at the hands of lawyers and psychologists. programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Lady Persie's life has become increasingly complex, as she continues her illicit affair and pursues her right-wing political interests with little regard for the potential danger to those she loves. Meanwhile, Lady Agnes prepares for motherhood by having her picture taken by celebrated photographer Cecil Beaton - a visit that causes excitement for one particular member of the downstairs staff - and Sir Hallam finds himself dragged into the crisis surrounding the abdication of Edward VIII facing the British monarchy. Keeley Hawes, Ed Stoppard, Anne Reid and Claire Foy star in the period drama

programme.desc: England v Australia. A replay of the opening day of the First Test at Trent Bridge, where the eagerly awaited series got under way. This is the 67th Test series to be played between the fierce rivals, dating back to 1882, and England start as favourites having won three of the last four series, and due to the difficulties the tourists have faced in replacing some of their most prominent players of recent years

programme.title: The Masters - Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the first day of the tournament, taking place at Augusta National in Augusta, Georgia. Tiger Woods won the previous tournament back in April 2019, posting a score of 13-under-par, finishing one shot ahead of fellow Americans Dustin Johnson, Brooks Koepka and Xander Schauffele. That victory took him to 15 Major Championship wins, with five of those wins coming at this tournament.

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at Dallas Cowboys' 1993 Super Bowl triumph against Buffalo Bills at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, Georgia. This match represented the first time in history that the same teams faced each other in the showpiece match in two consecutive years, while the Cowboys' 30-13 victory meant they tied the Pittsburgh Steelers and the San Francisco 49ers for most Super Bowl wins, as they claimed their fourth trophy
